---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels:
  - enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What pain point or use case should this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change at a high level (playbook, role, docs, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

## Related ADRs

Link any relevant `docs/adrs/` documents, or note if a new ADR may be needed.

## Additional context

Topology (SNO / compact / HA), connected vs disconnected, and other constraints.
